headline: NBC Universal could be Netflix's next big acquisition target: BofA analyst
summary: While reporting mixed second quarter earnings results, it's Netflix's (NFLX) disappointing third quarter outlook that's dragging the stock lower on Friday. BofA Securities senior media & entertainment analyst Jessica Reif Ehrlich addresses whether an acquisition is still on the table for the streaming giant after losing out on its bid for Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD).
